message:
fix(freeze): address QuickJS ref counting issues in codegen

- buffer.zig: Free array_buf after JS_CallConstructor (constructor dups args)
- child_process.zig: Same fix for createBuffer
- compression.zig: Same fix for createUint8Array
- zig_codegen_full.zig: Remove incorrect JSValue.free calls that caused
  use-after-free (func/args in calls, method/this in call_method,
  ctor/args in call_constructor, argv in put_arg/set_arg)

Note: GC assertion still fails - deeper CV lifetime management review needed
